## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and why is it hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Include UI/API/CLI shape if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Affected component(s), related ADRs/docs, scope/impact on existing tenants.
